title: Podman 4.2.1 in MacOS Intel cannot connect to Podman VM /kind bug
body:
**Is this a BUG REPORT or FEATURE REQUEST? (leave only one on its own line)**

/kind bug

<!--
I installed podman using brew install podman. Podman version installed is 4.2.1 . Unfortunately, even if running podman images command or podman ps, it cannot connect to the Podman VM. 
-->

**Steps to reproduce the issue:**

1. podman images

2. podman ps

3. podman info

**Describe the results you received:**


Cannot connect to Podman. Please verify your connection to the Linux system using `podman system connection list`, or try `podman machine init` and `podman machine start` to manage a new Linux VM
Error: unable to connect to Podman. failed to create sshClient: connection to bastion host (ssh://core@localhost:50693/run/user/501/podman/podman.sock) failed: dial tcp: lookup localhost: i/o timeout
**Describe the results you expected:**


**Additional information you deem important (e.g. issue happens only occasionally):**

**Output of `podman version`:**
podman version
Cannot connect to Podman. Please verify your connection to the Linux system using `podman system connection list`, or try `podman machine init` and `podman machine start` to manage a new Linux VM
Error: unable to connect to Podman. failed to create sshClient: connection to bastion host (ssh://core@localhost:50693/run/user/501/podman/podman.sock) failed: dial tcp: lookup localhost: i/o timeout```
(paste your output here)
```

**Output of `podman info`:**
Cannot connect to Podman. Please verify your connection to the Linux system using `podman system connection list`, or try `podman machine init` and `podman machine start` to manage a new Linux VM
Error: unable to connect to Podman. failed to create sshClient: connection to bastion host (ssh://core@localhost:50693/run/user/501/podman/podman.sock) failed: dial tcp: lookup localhost: i/o timeout```
(paste your output here)
```

**Package info (e.g. output of `rpm -q podman` or `apt list podman`):**
```
brew install podman
```

**Have you tested with the latest version of Podman and have you checked the Podman Troubleshooting Guide? (https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/troubleshooting.md)**


Yes (Issue not listed)

**Additional environment details (AWS, VirtualBox, physical, etc.):**
MacOS Monterey 12.5 / Intel i7 10th Gen
